name: Senior Taxpayer Deduction

eligibility.description: Available for tax years beginning after 2017 and before 2029. Requires the taxpayer to be 65+ and have a modified adjusted gross income below $75,000 ($150,000 for joint returns) to receive the full amount; subject to a 6% phase-out above those thresholds.

description: A specific deduction of $6,000 is allowed for taxpayers (and their spouses on joint returns) who have attained age 65 before the close of the taxable year.
